channel.title: Asset Management on dasarpAI
channel.description: Recent content in Asset Management on dasarpAI

item.title: Asset Management Reconciliation
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Part 8 of the Complete Guide to Reconciliation Systems in BFSI

At the end of a valuation day, an investment fund’s portfolio system and custodian agree that the fund owns 100,000 shares of a company. Operations celebrates a clean position reconciliation. Minutes later, the fund accountant reports that the fund’s net asset value is overstated.

The shares are correct. Their price is not.

The valuation system used yesterday’s closing price of USD 20.00 instead of today’s approved price of USD 19.50. The position is therefore overstated by USD 50,000:

item.title: Understanding Financial Entity Types in the Indian Financial Ecosystem
item.author: hari@dasarpai.com (Dr. Hari Thapliyaal)
item.description:
Understanding Financial Entity Types in the Indian Financial Ecosystem (With Global Parallels)
#

1. Introduction: Why Understanding Entity Types Matters
#

In the financial world, every transaction, investment, audit, or policy decision involves a variety of institutions, each playing a distinct role. For newcomers or even a person with 3–5 years of experience, it’s often overwhelming to navigate this landscape. Even for seasoned professionals, having a structured knowledge graph of the ecosystem helps in making better decisions, building financial products, or analyzing systemic risks.
